title: Ability to reorganize automations/create organizing folders in the automation center
excerpt: I would like to have the ability to reorganize the automations listed in the automation center into a manual set order. This way you can group like automations together. Additionally, it would be great if you can create …

posts.author: jgilder (Jordan Gilder)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have the ability to reorganize the automations listed in the automation center into a manual set order. This way you can group like automations together. Additionally, it would be great if you can create organizing folders in the automation center and place like automations in the same folder.
